64.output: This is an excellent opportunity for me to share my personal experience with overcoming challenges. I once faced a difficult situation when my car broke down, and I had to wait for a whole week to catch a bus. This experience was quite embarrassing as I am not familiar with the bus routes, and I was late several times. However, I learned from this experience and became more confident in handling such situations.
